name: Chocolate Nut Chocolate Cake w Grilled Orange
recipeIngredient: 12 Navel oranges, peeled and pith removed
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Gourmet Magazine, March 1994
Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan and line the bottom with parchment paper.
In batches, grind nuts fine in a food processor, pulsing the motor.
In the food processor, finely chop chocolate with 6 tbsp sugar.
In a bowl, beat egg yolks until thick and pale; add chocolate mixture.
Add zests and beat until just combined.
In a clean bowl, beat egg whites and remaining 6 tbsp sugar to soft peaks. Fold nut and egg white mixtures into the chocolate mixture gently but thoroughly.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake in the middle of the oven for 55 minutes or until a tester comes out clean.
Cool cake in the pan on a rack; remove sides of the pan.
Gently toss orange sections with honey and let stand for 10 minutes.
Heat a hot, ridged grill pan over high heat. Grill oranges in batches, about 10 seconds on each side.
Serve cake with grilled oranges. This gives the cake a Sephardic slant.
